demo.title: Show me the meme
demo.code:
show me the meme

-> matches link-library.json by name, posts the caption
   + the entry's xPost link as plain text; X unfurls the media.

setup: Charge a 155 $BNKR fee (≈$0.055, just over BNKR's $0.05 transfer minimum) to the BNKR song-drop bot wallet 0xc7704FE4E31905471505FA1451746adB9dbaF27A FIRST — this on-chain transfer is the TRIGGER and accrues BNKR points. The recipient MUST verify as bankrbot: a plain ops wallet is rejected with 'recipient could not be verified as bankrbot', so the fee goes to this dedicated bankrbot wallet (BNKR earns its cut/points).
Fees are never charged in Money for Trees; this fee is $BNKR only
Trigger: a user on X asks to see/hear a library item (song or meme)

Delivery is a PLAIN-TEXT reply to the TAGGER with the entry's xPost link — X unfurls it. NEVER retweet/quote/repost any tweet (especially the one being replied to). No media upload, no X API credentials.
